title: hydrangea macrophylla subsp. angustata
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. angustata, also known as the narrow-leaved bigleaf hydrangea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hydrangiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. angustata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
